diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, types Env/H/Input/MiddlewareHandler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/factory.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory helper provides createFactory for handler composition, supports chaining 1-10 handlers with merged env/types, and creates middleware from handlers
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../request/constants, types/RoverRoute, ../../utils/url
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/typed.ts
+- Safe summary: Route info helpers that extract route paths and metadata from Context, used for logging/routing debug
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: ../../context, types/MiddlewareHandler/TypedResponse, ../../utils/http-status
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/websocket.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper with event listeners (onOpen/onMessage/onClose/onError) and WSContext for send/close methods
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: ../../utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/helper.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie helpers for reading/writing/delete signed and unsigned cookies with support for __Secure- and __Host- prefixes
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: ../../client, ../../context, ../../hono, types/Schema, utilities/types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/mock.ts
+- Safe summary: Creates a testing client from an app with custom fetch behavior for unit testing
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: no external reads, defines Runtime type
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/bun.ts, src/helper/adapter/deno.ts, src/helper/adapter/node.ts, src/helper/adapter/workerd.ts, src/helper/adapter/vercel.ts
+- Safe summary: Detects execution runtime (node/bun/deno/workerd/fastly/edge-light) and provides runtime-aware env access
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, utilities/html, ./common
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssr/streamed/css.ts
+- Safe summary: Experimental CSS-in-JS helper with unique class name generation, supports @keyframes and view transitions
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, toHash, minify
+- Reads as: no external reads, exports constants
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/ssr/streamed/css.ts
+- Safe summary: Shared CSS helpers with hash-based class naming, supports pseudo global selectors via :-hono-global, provides minification
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/websocket.ts
+- Safe summary: Fetch API wrapper for proxying, strips hop-by-hop headers, validates Connection header for RFC compliance
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: ../../hono, types/Env, utils/color, utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/reload.ts
+- Safe summary: Dev helper for inspecting and displaying app routes with optional colorization and handler details
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: utilities/html
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/ssr/streamed/html.ts
+- Safe summary: Template literal HTML helper with auto-escaping and callback support
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: re-exports from './ssg', exports from './middleware'
+- Reads as: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Main SSG entry point, exports toSSG and related middleware functions
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ToSSGOptions, SSGPlugin, ToSSGResult, ToSSGInterface, toSSG
+- Reads as: ../../client/utils, ../../hono, types/Env/Schema, utils/concurrent, utils/mime, ./middleware, ./plugins, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation with async content fetching and file writing, supports hooks, concurrency, and custom plugins
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: ../../hono, router, types/Env/RouterRoute, utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/reload.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for SSG including route filtering, path joining, dirname calculation, and output dir validation
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: ./utils
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG detection middleware, allows dynamic param generation per route and control over SSG context with disable/only flags
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamText, streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi
+- Reads as: utilities/stream, ./stream, ./sse, ./text
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/stream/stream.ts, src/helper/stream/sse.ts, src/helper/stream/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Main streaming entry point, exports stream for generic streaming, streamText with text/plain, and SSE
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: ../../context, ./utils, utilities/stream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/stream/stream.ts
+- Safe summary: Generic streaming helper using TransformStream, h
